tasks.subject: Task 1: Backend — Document Type and Re-ingest Error Handling
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend `_infer_tag` → `_infer_document_type`, expose `type` on inbox items, add try/except to re-ingest.

**Files:**
- Modify: `dashboard/app.py`
- Create: `tests/test_dashboard.py`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/app.py", "tests/test_dashboard.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_dashboard.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_infer_document_type returns all types", "inbox items have type field", "reingest has ok field and error handling"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Shared Controls CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create one CSS file for search/filter controls.

**Files:**
- Create: `dashboard/static/controls.css`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/static/controls.css"], "verifyCommand": "test -f dashboard/static/controls.css", "acceptanceCriteria": ["shared CSS file created", "no duplicate styles"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Dashboard Index — Inbox Filter/Search and Re-ingest UX
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add search, filter buttons, and error-aware re-ingest to main dashboard.

**Files:**
- Modify: `dashboard/static/index.html`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/static/index.html"], "verifyCommand": "uv run python -m dashboard", "acceptanceCriteria": ["search input works", "filter buttons work", "reingest error shows red"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Inbox Detail Page — Search and Type Filter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add same search/filter controls to /inbox page.

**Files:**
- Modify: `dashboard/static/inbox.html`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/static/inbox.html"], "verifyCommand": "uv run python -m dashboard", "acceptanceCriteria": ["search works on inbox page", "filter buttons work", "empty state shows"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm all tests pass, no regressions.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["test_dashboard.py passes", "test_ingest.py passes", "full suite passes"]}
```
